case_title: YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. VS. ELIZABETH WALKER et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. SERVED JAN-26-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, ELIZABETH

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, ELIZABETH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, ELIZABETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET #443, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94109 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, ELIZABETH UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. SERVED JAN-28-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS

AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. SERVED JAN-26-2014, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS
